CustomField.formula: OR( FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL01.03", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC01.03", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c= "ITL01.01", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC01.01", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL01.04", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC01.04", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL01.02", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL02.01", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL02.02", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITL02.03", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC01.02", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC02.01", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC02.02", FEC_SubCode__r.FEC_Code__c = "ITC02.03" )
CustomField.label: Hidden SLA Fomular
